title: Daoist Canon: Cantong Qi (Token of the Three) (Section 1)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Cantong Qi (Token of the Three)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Cantong Qi (Token of the Three)

translation.text: From the Cantong Qi (Token of the Three) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
